CVE-2009-0314.title: Untrusted search path vulnerability in the Python module in gedit ...
CVE-2009-0314.description: Untrusted search path vulnerability in the Python module in gedit allows local users to execute arbitrary code via a Trojan horse Python file in the current working directory, related to a vulnerability in the PySys_SetArgv function (CVE-2008-5983).

CVE-2017-14108.title: libgedit.a in GNOME gedit through 3.22.1 allows remote attackers  ...
CVE-2017-14108.description: libgedit.a in GNOME gedit through 3.22.1 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (CPU consumption) via a file that begins with many '\0' characters.
